_comment: Defense stat weights by position. Weights reflect relative importance for fit scoring. Target formula: (weight / 0.12) * 150. Budget: ~550 total defense (250 initial + 300 bonus levels).

C.name: Catcher
C.description: Awareness is king for catchers. Arm for throwing out stealers. Composure and reaction for blocking.

1B.name: First Base
1B.description: Reaction for scooping throws. Composure for handling difficult plays. Awareness for DP potential.

2B.name: Second Base
2B.description: Reaction for ground balls. Acrobatics and composure for range. Awareness for double play turns.

SS.name: Shortstop
SS.description: Reaction is critical. Arm for throws across the diamond. Composure under pressure. Awareness for DPs.

3B.name: Third Base
3B.description: Reaction for hot corner. Arm for long throws. Composure under pressure. Awareness for DP potential.

LF.name: Left Field
LF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Arm for throws home.

CF.name: Center Field
CF.description: Most demanding outfield position. Acrobatics, agility, and arm all critical.

RF.name: Right Field
RF.description: Acrobatics for catches. Agility for range. Strong arm for throws to third.

DH.name: Designated Hitter
DH.description: No defensive requirements. Focus entirely on batting stats.

P.name: Pitcher
P.description: Defense doesn't matter much for pitchers. Focus on pitching stats.
